directives.title: Enrich top 5 W251 contacts via free verification pipeline
directives.task: Run the contact verifier tool on the top 5 W251 priority contacts (ACTIVE_RFQ and TIER1) and return verification results. Write results to tools/contact-verifier/verified_top5.csv.
directives.context: Contacts are in tools/contact-verifier/contacts_sample.csv. Use the existing contact_verifier.py tool. Run with --limit 5 --priority ACTIVE_RFQ TIER1 --dry-run first, then confirm.

directives.title: Run pricing discovery dry-run and validate $9.27M BOP baseline
directives.task: Run the pricing discovery tool in dry-run mode across all 19 BOP categories. Confirm the total mid estimate is within 5% of $9.27M. Write output to tools/pricing-discovery/outputs/.
directives.context: Use tools/pricing-discovery/pricing_discovery.py --dry-run. Acceptable range: $8.8M–$9.75M. If outside range, investigate which categories deviated and why.

directives.title: Add RFQ truth for Baker Hughes Vibration Monitoring ($340K) and compute learning delta
directives.task: Create a rfq_truths.json file with the Baker Hughes Vibration Monitoring RFQ truth price of $340,000. Run the pricing discovery tool with --rfq-truths to generate the learning delta. Write pricing_learning_deltas.csv.
directives.context: RFQ truth: {"VIB_MON": {"price": 340000, "supplier": "Baker Hughes", "date": "2026-04-10"}}. Prior estimate is $268,250. Delta should show SIGNIFICANT_MISS (underestimate of ~27%).
